scenes.description: Omaru Polka continues her performance of 'ETERNAL BLAZE' on a fire-themed stage.
MC section where Polka welcomes the audience and introduces the theme of her birthday live, 'Glitter of Love'.
Omaru Polka and Shiranui Flare perform a duet of 'Housen Galaxy Cross'.

subtitles.original: 解き放って
subtitles.english: Set it free

subtitles.original: 自由の扉 開いてく
subtitles.english: Opening the door of freedom

subtitles.original: 強く果てない未来へ
subtitles.english: Toward a strong, endless future

subtitles.original: そう今ここから 始まる
subtitles.english: Yes, it starts now from here

subtitles.original: お待たせみんな！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thanks for waiting!

subtitles.original: 今年もポルカの誕生日が始まったー！
subtitles.english: Polka's birthday has begun again this year!

subtitles.original: タイトルは、かっこいい、Glitter of Love！
subtitles.english: The title is the cool "Glitter of Love"!

subtitles.original: というわけで、ハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: So, here's the hashtag!

subtitles.original: #尾丸ポルカ生誕祭2026
subtitles.english: #OmaruPolkaSeitansai2026

subtitles.original: でいっぱい、いっぱい呟いてね！
subtitles.english: Tweet lots and lots with it!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: いや、今回のテーマがまず、愛と勇気と戦う女の子になってます！
subtitles.english: Well, the theme this time is girls who fight with love and courage!

subtitles.original: そして、見てくださいこのステージ！
subtitles.english: And look at this stage!

subtitles.original: えいっ！はぁ〜、すごい広い！
subtitles.english: Tada! Wow, it's so huge!

subtitles.original: おー、なんとですね、広いんですけど、まずスクリーンが超デカい！大迫力！
subtitles.english: Oh, it's huge, but first, the screen is super big! Great impact!

subtitles.original: なんとなくいつもの3倍くらい頑張りました！いや、頑張ってもらいました！
subtitles.english: I worked about three times harder than usual! Well, I had them work harder for me!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: というわけでですね、ここからゲストの方々がたくさんいらっしゃいます！
subtitles.english: So, from here on, many guests will be joining us!

subtitles.original: もうホロメンだけなら多分、尾丸ポルカ史上最多のゲスト数だと思っております！
subtitles.english: In terms of Hololive members alone, I think it's the largest number of guests in Omaru Polka's history!

subtitles.original: それをね、これからノンストップでお送りするので、楽しんでいってください！
subtitles.english: We'll be bringing them to you non-stop, so please enjoy!

subtitles.original: というわけで、いくぞ！
subtitles.english: So, let's go!

subtitles.original: 遺伝子レベルの
subtitles.english: At the genetic level

subtitles.original: Independent
subtitles.english: Independent

subtitles.original: 絶望も希望も
subtitles.english: Embracing both despair

subtitles.original: 抱いて
subtitles.english: and hope

subtitles.original: 足掻け 命尽きるまで
subtitles.english: Struggle until your life ends

subtitles.original:
星天ギャラクシィクロス
作詞・作曲：上松範康 (Elements Garden)
subtitles.english:
Housen Galaxy Cross
Lyrics/Composition: Noriyasu Agematsu (Elements Garden)

subtitles.original: 光と飛沫のKiss
subtitles.english: A kiss of light and spray

subtitles.original: 恋のような
subtitles.english: Like love

subtitles.original: 虹のBirthday
subtitles.english: A rainbow birthday

subtitles.original: どんな美しき日も
subtitles.english: No matter how beautiful the day

subtitles.original: 何か生まれ 何かが死ぬ
subtitles.english: Something is born, and something dies

subtitles.original: せめて歌おう I Love You
subtitles.english: At least let's sing, I love you

subtitles.original: 世界がひどい地獄だとしても
subtitles.english: Even if the world is a terrible hell

subtitles.original: せめて伝えよう I Love You
subtitles.english: At least let's convey it, I love you

subtitles.original: 解放の時は来た
subtitles.english: The time for liberation has come

subtitles.original: 星降る天へと響き跳べ Everybody Song
subtitles.english: Ring out and leap to the star-filled heavens, Everybody Song

subtitles.original: Stardust
subtitles.english: Stardust

subtitles.original: そして奇跡は待つものじゃなくて
subtitles.english: And miracles aren't things you wait for

subtitles.original: その手で作るものと吠えろ
subtitles.english: Shout that they are things you create with your own hands

subtitles.original: 涙した過去を苦みを
subtitles.english: The past you wept through, the bitterness

subtitles.original: レクイエムにして
subtitles.english: Turn them into a requiem

subtitles.original: 正々堂々力で
subtitles.english: Fair and square, with all your might

subtitles.original: 輝けFutureを
subtitles.english: Shine on, the future

subtitles.original: 信じ鳴らせ
subtitles.english: Believe and ring it out

subtitles.original: 星天ギャラクシィクロス
subtitles.english: Housen Galaxy Cross

subtitles.original: 独りじゃないことを
subtitles.english: That you are not alone

subtitles.original: やがて君は知る日のため
subtitles.english: For the day you will eventually come to know it

subtitles.original: 指先伝うアストロ
subtitles.english: Astro traveling through your fingertips

subtitles.original: 分かち合って明日へ向かう
subtitles.english: Share it and head toward tomorrow

subtitles.original: 問わない空に I feel you
subtitles.english: To the unquestioning sky, I feel you

subtitles.original: 自由の魂は鼓動せましない
subtitles.english: The soul of freedom will not stop beating

subtitles.original: 不滅なる夢に I feel you
subtitles.english: To the immortal dream, I feel you

subtitles.original: 魂へと剣を握れ
subtitles.english: Grasp the sword for your soul

subtitles.original: 運命を終焉も断ち切る力で
subtitles.english: With the power to cut through fate and the end

subtitles.original: そして重ねた友情は...
subtitles.english: And the friendship we've built...
